headline: Hypertension Awareness at Only 48% Despite Affecting 6.4 Million Adults
context: Less than half of Malaysians with high blood pressure know they have the condition due to inadequate screening.

cards.big: 52% of 6.4 million hypertensive Malaysians are unaware of their condition in 2025
cards.sub: Uncontrolled hypertension is the leading cause of stroke and heart attack in Malaysia

cards.big: Free blood pressure checks at government clinics require appointment waiting 2-4 weeks
cards.sub: Appointment barriers deter healthy adults from accessing routine screening services

cards.big: Hypertension causes 42% of all stroke deaths and 35% of heart attack deaths in Malaysia
cards.sub: Simple medication costing RM8 monthly can control blood pressure and prevent these deaths

cards.big: Canada's hypertension awareness reached 87% through pharmacy-based screening without appointment
cards.sub: Walk-in community screening at accessible locations dramatically improves detection rates

cards.big: 3.3 million people walking around with a ticking time bomb they do not know about is preventable tragedy
Should pharmacies be authorized to provide walk-in blood pressure screening and referral
